title: Burst thrusters
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Burst thrusters''' were a type of mechanical device used to provide thrust for [[Swoop/Legends|swoops]] and [[Podracer/Legends|Podracers]], as well as homemade missiles.<ref name="Outbound Flight">[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}}
